subject: refactor(timing): extract heatmap render into TimingHeatmap component
body:
Audit finding #16 — Timing.jsx was 573 lines, over the 500-line
component soft-limit from CLAUDE.md "Code Organization". The
biggest single block was renderHeatmap (~113 lines) holding three
mutually-exclusive render branches (weekly bar grid, daily bar list,
24×7 hourly grid) plus the HEATMAP_LEVEL_CLASSES palette and
getHeatmapLevel helper.

Extracted to a new presentational component:

  dashboard/js/components/TimingHeatmap.jsx (166 lines)

The new file holds three internal render-branch components
(WeeklyHeatmap, DailyHeatmap, HourlyHeatmap) plus the shared
getHeatmapLevel helper and HEATMAP_LEVEL_CLASSES palette. The
exported TimingHeatmap component is a thin type-discriminator that
picks the right branch from the heatmapContent prop. Parent
(sections/Timing.jsx) keeps all data shaping inside its existing
useMemo and just passes the resulting object as a single prop.

After:
  dashboard/js/sections/Timing.jsx: 573 → 436 lines (-137, under
    the 500-line soft-limit with headroom)
  dashboard/js/components/TimingHeatmap.jsx: new (166 lines, well
    under the limit)

Test fixup:
  scripts/__tests__/daisyui-surfaces.test.mjs Heatmap intensity
  test now reads dashboard/js/components/TimingHeatmap.jsx for the
  HEATMAP_LEVEL_CLASSES palette assertions instead of Timing.jsx.
  Added two new assertions on Timing.jsx itself to guard against
  accidental re-inlining: must `import TimingHeatmap from` and must
  render `<TimingHeatmap`. The styles.css negative assertions
  (deleted .heatmap-N rules, deleted --chart-accent-override hook)
  are unchanged because they apply to a different file.

All other behavioural assertions about the heatmap palette
(stock bg-primary/N utilities, no deleted .heatmap-N custom
classes) still pass — the extraction is a code-organization
refactor with zero behavioural change.

Build clean (562.18 kB → 562.30 kB, +0.12 kB component scaffold).
60/60 tests pass.

Tags: refactor, ui, code-organization, audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: vanilla-daisyui-cleanup
Semver: patch
title: extract heatmap render into TimingHeatmap component
